entries.definition:
n–b–z title, nickname, derisive or insulting name, descriptive
name (usually bad), to call one another names, to defame. Of this
root, تَنَابَزُوا tanābazū, occurs once in the Qur’an.

تَنَابَزَ tanābaza [elided form of تَتَنَابَزُوا tatanābazū, imperf. of v.
VI تَنَابَزَ tanābaza, intrans.] to call one another names (49:11) وَلَا
تَلْمِزُوا أَنْفُسَكُمْ وَلَا تَنَابَزُوا بِالْأَلْقَابِ do not defame one another, nor revile
[one another] with nicknames.
